info.title: GrowthHero API
info.description: The GrowthHero API is a RESTful API for managing affiliate and refer-a-friend programs. It allows you to manage partners, orders, groups, payout batches, and subscriptions.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all your partners.
Returns a single partner by ID.

post.description: Generate a payout for the remaining balance of the partner.
Adjust the balance of a partner either positively or negatively.

get.description: Get all transactions for a partner. Filter by type.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of resources per page (max 250, default 25)

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Comma-separated types to filter: ManualTransaction, OrderCommission, DiscountPayout, PaypalMassPayout, ManualPayout

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all orders referred by your partners.
Returns a single order by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of all groups. Returns 25 groups per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter groups by name or slug

parameters.name: show_all
parameters.description: Skip pagination and return all groups

get.description: Get a single group by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of all payout batches. Returns 25 per page.

post.description: Generate a mass payout for all eligible partners with eligible balance.

get.description: Get details of a single payout batch.

post.description: Mark a pending payout batch as paid.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscriptions. Returns 25 per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by partner name, customer name, or plan name

get.description: Get a single subscription by ID.

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-KEY
apiKeyAuth.description: Your API key from Settings > Integrations > API page
